top_signals.title: Fuji Media’s Real Estate Unit Attracts 1 Trillion Yen Bids
top_signals.summary: Fuji Media Holdings Inc. has received stronger-than-expected interest in its real estate subsidiary, attracting bidders including KKR & Co., Blackstone Inc. and Goldman Sachs Group Inc., people familiar with the matter said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Asia tech stocks drop after Broadcom rattles AI trade and drags Wall Street names lower
top_signals.summary: Asian technology shares fell, tracking losses in U.S. semiconductor stocks after disappointing earnings Broadcom sparked a rotation out of AI-linked names.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
